title: Java ByteArrayInputStream
summary: The Java ByteArrayInputStream can turn a Java byte array into an InputStream. Thus, the Java ByteArrayInputStream is very useful when you have a byte array, but need an InputStream for some purpose. This Java ByteArrayInputStream tutorial has been updated with more descriptions and examples.
